description_long: This is an ornate chandelier with a central cylindrical body and six gracefully curved arms extending outward, each supporting a cylindrical lampshade. The arms are adorned with intricate metal filigree, giving the fixture a decorative and elegant appearance. The lampshades appear to be made of a translucent material, likely glass or fabric, allowing diffused light to emanate from each bulb. The chandelier is suspended from a chain, indicating it is designed for ceiling mounting. The overall design is symmetrical, with each arm evenly spaced around the central axis. The metallic finish and detailed craftsmanship suggest a luxurious and classic style suitable for upscale urban interiors or public spaces.
description: An ornate chandelier with six curved arms, cylindrical lampshades, and intricate metal filigree, suspended from a chain for ceiling mounting.
description_view_0: Front view showing three prominent arms and lampshades, with detailed filigree visible on the central body.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the side arms and the symmetrical arrangement of the lampshades.
description_view_2: Direct side view highlighting the even spacing of all six arms and the cylindrical shape of the lampshades.
description_view_3: Another angled view similar to view 1, emphasizing the ornate central structure and the curvature of the arms.
